title: Meta readies two prescription-supported Ray-Ban AI glasses, set to launch next week: Report
snippet: Meta plans to launch two new Ray-Ban smart glasses next week for prescription wearers The glasses will be available in rectangular and rounded styles, sold through traditional eyewear channels

title: Microsoft reportedly developing a cheaper Xbox Game Pass tier for first-party studio titles: here's what to expect
snippet: A leak suggests Microsoft is creating a budget Xbox Game Pass tier named 'Triton', focusing on first-party games like Fallout 4 and Gears 5. The move comes amidst rumours that Xbox CEO Asha Sharma wants to make Game pass more affordable

title: Netflix raises US prices once more — what does this mean for viewers?
snippet: Netflix has increased subscription prices in the United States for the second time in under two years, raising costs across all plans. The move reflects broader industry pressures and a push to boost revenue amid slowing subscriber growth.

title: Sony to raise PlayStation 5 price to offset soaring memory chip costs. Here's how much it will cost now
snippet: Effective 2 April, the new US pricing will set the standard Sony PlayStation 5 at $649.99, up from $549.99.

title: Sharp launches India's first window AC with active air purification: Check price, specs, and features
snippet: Sharp has launched the Ryohu-FS fixed-speed window ACs with capacities from 1.41 to 1.70 tons. The new window AC lineup comes with a 5-year warranty with prices starting at  ₹34,490 in India.

title: Google employees are flocking to ‘Agent Smith’ AI tool to automate coding tasks from their phones: Report
snippet: Google employees are using a new AI tool named Agent Smith which automates tasks like coding. The popularity of the new tool has led Google to restrict has led to restricted access by the company .

title: Meet Claude Mythos: Anthropic accidentally leaks unreleased AI model with severe cybersecurity risks
snippet: Anthropic's upcoming AI model, Claude Mythos, was leaked due to a ‘human error’. The leaked blog also revealed a new AI tier, Capybara, which could sit above the Claude Opus tier.&nbsp;

title: Austria plans social media ban for under-14s, cites ‘addictive algo’ - When, how will it roll out? All you need to know
snippet: Ministers from the three ruling parties reportedly said they have reached an agreement in principle on introducing the ban – which is aimed at protecting children from ‘addictive algorithms’ and harmful content, including sexual abuse

title: WhatsApp' big update ends iOS-to-Android transfer restrictions and introduces dual accounts for iPhones
snippet: WhatsApp's latest update has introduced some new features like dual accounts on iOS, cross-platform chat transfer, and improved storage management. The company also now allows users to manage large files in specific chats and take adavantage of Meta AI for photo editing and writing suggestions

title: Marc Andreessen dismisses AI layoff fears; Elon Musk says work will be optional in the future
snippet: AI layoffs: Referencing the Lump of Labor Fallacy, Andreessen argued that fears of AI-driven job scarcity are rooted in a flawed assumption that the amount of work in an economy is fixed. In reality, he said, productivity gains from technologies have expanded economic output and led to job creation

title: What is the WTO ecommerce moratorium: Everything you need to know
snippet: The ecommerce moratorium is a global agreement among World Trade Organisation ​members which bans customs duties being ​applied to electronic transmissions such as digital downloads and streaming. title: IPL 2026 begins: Google unveils interactive doodle with live scores feature
snippet: Marking the commencement of one of the biggest sporting spectacles in the country, Google on Saturday unveiled a special Doodle titled Indian Premier League 2026 to celebrate the opening of the tournament's 19th edition.

title: AI deepfakes blur reality in 2026 US midterm campaigns

title: Live Translate with Headphones: Google expands feature to more countries across iOS, Android
snippet: The company first rolled it out in December last year, integrating Gemini’s translation capabilities into Google Translate for text. As of December, the Translate app supported more than 70 languages.
